examples: There has been a sharp slowdown in economic growth.
Customers have cut back spending because of the economic slowdown.
Ms. Su says the slowdown in growth is not due to shoppers losing their enthusiasm, but because of the abundance of competitors around town.
It is confronted with a confidence crisis, aggravated by the slowdown in global economic growth.
The slowdown isn't automatic, and it isn't for the entire length of the trip.
